docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,477.50 FILED BY CLARE, CHAPMAN, STOREY, MCLOUGHLIN & BOWEN, LLP AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK AGENT FOR SERVICE: SHERRILL JOHNSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
